stops.title: The network at a glance
stops.body: Where global shipment flows stand today, against the same period last year.

stops.title: Every flow vs last year
stops.body: Solid bar = this year, ghost = same period last year, on one shared scale. The sparkline shows exactly where the year diverges.

stops.title: Every number explains itself
stops.body: One click on a YoY chip answers the why: a one-line explanation, the monthly trend and the areas driving the move.

stops.title: Efficiency: pieces per shipment
stops.body: Batch size shows where logistics consolidates or fragments: rising means each shipment carries more.

stops.title: Every figure is backed by the source
stops.body: The full shipment database behind every number: searchable, filterable and exportable to CSV.

stops.title: Coverage on the world map
stops.body: How much of each area's estimated volume the network already observes, area by area.

stops.title: Explore freely
stops.body: Refreshed monthly. Every view is a link you can share: area, market and metric all live in the URL.
